items.preprocessing: 6/7 - Implements configurable downsampling (auto to max_dimension=4096, optional scale_factor/target_size), Gaussian blur with odd-kernel enforcement, and background subtraction with multiple methods (morphological/adaptive/gaussian) followed by normalization. Preprocess module appears complete, but full pipeline orchestration (load_and_preprocess/preprocess_image truncated) and explicit large-image tiling/memory strategy for 30000x30000 is not shown.
items.coarse_detection: 4/7 - Has thresholding, largest external contour selection, and minimum enclosing circle fitting. However the provided coarse_detection.py is truncated (HoughCircles incomplete) and there is no visible coarse_localize wrapper, no demonstrated conversion back to original-scale coordinates after downsampling, and contour retrieval is RETR_EXTERNAL only (may miss inner/outer ring structure).
items.fine_detection: 4/7 - Contains radial sampling over angles, 1D smoothing (scipy gaussian_filter1d), gradient computation, and positive/negative/both peak-based edge detection logic. But the core radial_gradient_scan/fine_localize is truncated, dual-edge selection strategy for inner edge is not fully shown, and sampling uses nearest-neighbor integer rounding (no true subpixel refinement / interpolation). SciPy dependency may also hurt performance/portability.
items.statistical_analysis: 0/7 - statistical_analysis.py content is not provided, so MAD computation, 3-sigma rejection, and robust radius/center estimation usage cannot be verified from the given code excerpt.
items.mask_generation: 3/7 - Provides solid circular/annular mask generation with optional anti-aliasing and includes a chord-adaptive crop function stub, but apply_chord_adaptive_crop is truncated and there is no visible chord detection (low-gradient arc segmentation), chord midpoint extraction, high-intensity point detection, or outlier coordinate identification in the provided content.

eval_report.comment: Good — solid implementation with minor gaps.

- **Coarse Localization**: Maximum contour detection with Hough Circle fallback
- **Fine Localization**: Radial gradient scanning with dual-edge detection strategy
- **Statistical Analys
